image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about multimedia learning than social media does.
Context visual: Multimedia learning combines text, images, and sounds. But how does it work?
Escalation visual: Studies show that our brains process visuals faster than text. This means more retention.
Evidence visual: In fact, combining these elements can boost learning by up to 60%.
Payoff visual: So, to learn effectively, mix visuals with audio. It’s simple but powerful.
Cta visual: Curious for more learning tips? Follow for science-backed insights!
